plugin.name: wayfire-converge-lock
plugin._long: Freeze the screen and slide both halves inward to collapse onto the centre vertical seam over black, then hold. A pre-lock transition driven over IPC by lumen-lockscreen; the held collapsed frame is what the lock surface expands back out of.

option.name: toggle
option._long: Optional keybinding to play the converge by hand. Unset by default — the real driver is the lumen-lockscreen daemon over IPC.

option.name: backdrop_color
option._long: Flat colour shown in the widening gap as the halves squish to the seam. Black by default so the desktop appears sucked into the void.

option.name: safety_timeout
option._long: If the driving daemon dies and never sends stop, restore the desktop after this long rather than freezing forever.
